phrases.intent_en: Ask if the Palais des Festivals is visible from here
phrases.text_local: Peut-on voir le Palais des Festivals depuis cet endroit ?
phrases.pronunciation: puh-TON VWAR leh pah-LAY day fes-tee-VAL deh-PWEE set an-DRWAH
phrases.cultural_note: La Croisette stretches 1.5km east of the Palais — the iconic building is at the western end near the old port.

responses.english: Yes, just at the end of the promenade.
responses.phonetic: wee, zhoost oh BOO duh lah proh-muh-NAD
responses.french: Oui, juste au bout de la promenade.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the private beach clubs are open to the public
phrases.text_local: Les plages privées de La Croisette sont-elles accessibles sans réservation ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay PLAZH pree-VAY deh lah kwah-ZET son-TEL ak-se-SEEBL san ray-zehr-vah-SYON
phrases.cultural_note: Most Croisette beach clubs allow walk-ins for a fee — expect to pay for a sunlounger and parasol in high season.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest public beach is on La Croisette
phrases.text_local: Où est la plage publique la plus proche ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lah PLAHZH poo-BLEEK lah ploo PROHSH
phrases.cultural_note: Between the private beach clubs on La Croisette there are free public beach sections. Look for the signs saying 'plage publique'.

responses.english: A bit further, past the beach club.
responses.phonetic: uhn puh ploo LWEHN, ah-PREH luh KLOOB
responses.french: Un peu plus loin, après le club.

phrases.intent_en: Ask when the Cannes Film Festival takes place
phrases.text_local: À quelle période de l'année se tient le Festival de Cannes ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel pay-ryod deh lah-NAY seh TYAN leh fes-tee-VAL deh KAN
phrases.cultural_note: The Cannes Film Festival takes place every May. During the festival, La Croisette is transformed with red carpets and star sightings.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a table at a café with a sea view
phrases.text_local: Auriez-vous une table en terrasse avec vue sur la mer ?
phrases.pronunciation: oh-RYAY voo oon TAB-leh an teh-RAS ah-VEK vyoo soor lah MEHR
phrases.cultural_note: The grand hotels along La Croisette — Majestic, Carlton, Martinez — all have terrace cafés open to non-guests.
